17.reason: The index j is incorrectly updated. After the loop, j should be incremented by n (the number of characters added), but here j is set to j+n-1, which causes the next character to overwrite the last added character. It should be j = j + n;

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  The index j is incorrectly updated. After the loop, j should be incremented by n (the number of characters added), but here j is set to j+n-1, which causes the next character to overwrite the last added character. It should be j = j + n;
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  // Should be j += n; because n is the count of inserted characters, and we already wrote n chars starting at b[j]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  // Should be j += n; because n = a[i+1]-a[i-1], and we wrote n characters starting from b[j], so next free index is j + n

14.reason: [Loop condition should be n < a[i+1]-a[i-1]-1 to avoid including the rightmost character; current loop includes it, but due to overwrite it works, but logically incorrect]
